title: Etsy Inc (ETSY) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
text: In the Q1 2026 earnings call, Etsy management discussed the company's strategic priorities and outlook. CEO Kruti Patel Goyal emphasized the focus on returning to GMS growth through AI-driven personalization and search improvements. The company reported that generative AI for search ranking and item discovery has enhanced the buyer experience, with improved matching between buyer intent and listings. Management highlighted the success of agentic commerce partnerships, with ChatGPT, Google, and Microsoft integration generating fifteen-fold year-over-year increases in agentic traffic. The company discussed the planned Depop sale to eBay for $1.2 billion, expected to close by end of Q3 2026, and the completed sale of Reverb in April 2025. Etsy reaffirmed full-year 2026 guidance for adjusted EBITDA margins of 28% to 30% and expressed confidence in year-over-year GMS growth for each quarter of 2026. Management also discussed the impact of tariffs and FX headwinds on international operations and the company's focus on selective price increases and cost management.
